empty.title: No users
empty.description: No users found for the selected filters

reason.label: Reason
reason.placeholder: The user did not respect our Terms of Service

sure.label: Are you sure?
sure.description: Please confirm that you know what you're doing and that the action will be immediate.
sure.descriptionIrreversible: Please confirm that you know what you're doing and that the action will be immediate and irreversible.

editLimits.title: Editing {username}... | Editing {count} users...
editLimits.description: You can update here the limits of {username}. | You can update here the limits of the selected users.
editLimits.toast: Limits successfully updated for the selected users.

suspend.title: Suspending {username}... | Suspending {count} users...
suspend.description: You're about to suspend {username} which means he/she won't be able to use Discord Analytics until the suspension is revoked (this also includes his/her bots). | You're about to suspend the selected users which means they won't be able to use Discord Analytics until the suspension is revoked (this also includes users' bots).
suspend.toast: The selected users have been successfully suspended.

delete.title: Delete {username}... | Delete {count} users...
delete.description: You're about to delete {username} which means its account and all associated data will be permanently deleted from the database. | You're about to delete the selected users which means their account and all associated data will be permanently deleted from the database.
delete.toast: The selected users have been successfully deleted.

empty.title: No bots
empty.description: This user does not have access to any bots
